task_config.description: Evaluate whether the assigned categories and sentiments are accurate for each text.

items.text: The recent advancement in artificial intelligence has revolutionized healthcare diagnostics. Machine learning algorithms can now detect diseases from medical imaging with higher accuracy than human radiologists.
Breaking: Major tech company announces layoffs affecting 10,000 employees across multiple divisions amid restructuring efforts.
Quantum computing represents a paradigm shift in computational capabilities, potentially solving problems that are currently intractable for classical computers.
